regions.text: It can be hard for people from different countries to understand one another. In the past, few knew anything about other countries.
Today men hear more about other countries, but often about how bad governments are or about wrong ideas others have of them.
If we knew them better, we would see people are like ourselves. Men’s minds are as like one another as their bodies are.
to understand a person: to see what his ideas and feelings are. FUTURE: will understand. PRESENT: understand(s). PAST: understood.
